data.narrative:
MBRYONICS is a Series B-stage Space & Aerospace company that has raised €17.5M+ to date. Our valuation assessment draws on a peer universe of five private companies in the same sector and stage, supplemented by reference to six public Space & Aerospace comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL, and one additional ticker).

The peer-median method is the primary applicable triangulation approach. The five same-sector, same/adjacent-stage private peers—Sierra Space ($8.0B Series C), Cowboy Space Corporation ($2.0B Series B), Varda Space Industries ($1.5B Series C), Aalyria ($1.3B Series B), and Skyryse ($1.1B Series C)—yield a median valuation of $1.5B and a range of $1.1B to $8.0B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples (sector median 25.8x across six tickers) cannot be applied without MBRYONICS's revenue, which remains undisclosed.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.3B to $1.7B, centered on $1.5B. Key uncertainties include the wide dispersion among peers—particularly Sierra Space's $8.0B valuation—which reflects heterogeneous technology maturity and customer traction within early-stage aerospace. Revenue disclosure would enable multiples-based validation and narrower bound-setting.
